site.name: Viking Events
site.tagline: Nordic calendar of viking & iron age happenings

home.hero_eyebrow: Iron Age · Viking Age · Early Medieval
home.hero_sub: Markets, battle reenactments, courses and feasts — every event of the Nordic Viking reenactment community in one almanac.
home.next_up_sub: Quick peek at what's coming — perfect for weekend planning.
home.next_up_empty: No upcoming events right now. Check back soon.
home.step1_d: Browse the calendar or list, filter by category and date.
home.step2_d: Add your own event using the form — free and community-driven.
home.step3_d: An admin reviews and publishes the event after a short check.

events.title: Event calendar
events.sub: Calendar or list view. Filter by category.
events.empty: No events right now — check back soon or submit one.
events.ical_help: Downloads an iCal (.ics) file that adds all approved viking events directly to your calendar (Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, Outlook). The subscription stays in sync — new events appear automatically.
events.merchants_present_help: These merchants have indicated they will attend this event.

submit.title: Submit an event
submit.sub: Your submission will appear after admin approval.
submit.autotranslate_hint: Submit the title and description in your own language — we auto-translate them to all supported languages (Finnish, English, Swedish, Danish, German, Estonian, Polish).
submit.gallery_empty: No gallery images yet. Add a URL below.
submit.success: Thank you! Your event was submitted for review.

upload.empty_library: Library is empty — upload your first image.

admin.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this event?
admin.newsletter_sub: Send a digest of the next 60 days of events to all active subscribers manually, or let the scheduler send it on the 1st of each month at 09:00 Helsinki time.
admin.newsletter_confirm: Send the newsletter to all active subscribers?
admin.weekly_sub: Get a short weekly summary in your inbox (pending events, next 30 days, new subscribers). Sent automatically every Monday at 09:00 Helsinki time.
admin.weekly_confirm: Send the weekly digest to your email?
admin.merchants_sub: Add, edit or remove merchants and smiths.
admin.guilds_sub: Add, edit or remove guilds and associations.

users.title: Users
users.add_admin_help: Create a new admin account. The user will have immediate access to the dashboard.
users.confirm_delete: Permanently delete user {user}? This will also remove all their RSVPs and subscriptions per GDPR. This cannot be undone.
users.cannot_delete_self: You can't delete your own account

merchant_requests.title: Merchant card requests
merchant_requests.lead: Activation requests submitted by users. Approval automatically activates the card for 12 months.
merchant_requests.reject_prompt: Short reason for rejection (will be sent to the user):

overview.users_help: Manage users, GDPR delete, and create admin accounts.
overview.messages_help: Message attendees and track delivery stats.
overview.newsletter_help: Monthly newsletter, subscribers, and weekly digest.

messages.compose_help: As an admin you can message any attendee of any event who has given consent. Opens the messaging page.

push.title: Push notifications status
push.test_no_token: You don't have a push token registered yet. Install the mobile app and sign in.
push.empty_help: Push messages can't reach anyone yet because no user has registered a push token via the mobile app. Install the app, sign in, allow notifications — the app will register the token automatically.

events.no_attendees: No one has RSVP'd to this event yet.

translations.title: Translation coverage
translations.help: Each event is automatically translated into all supported languages (FI, EN, SV, DA, DE, ET, PL). A background sweep checks for missing translations every 6 hours; you can also run the check manually with the button below.

account.login_sub: Signing in unlocks your profile and future features. Browsing remains optional.
account.register_sub: Join the community and save your profile.
account.have_account: Already have an account? Sign in
account.error_invalid_remaining: Invalid email or password. Attempts remaining: {remaining}.
account.error_locked: Too many failed login attempts. Your account is locked for {minutes} minutes for security. Use password reset or wait for the lock to expire.
account.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
account.profile_sub: Update your nickname and tell us what you do.
account.forgot_sub: Enter your email address. We'll send you a link to set a new password. The link expires in 60 minutes.
account.forgot_sent: If that email address is registered, we've sent you a password reset link.
account.forgot_sent_help: Check your spam folder too. The link is valid for 60 minutes.
account.reset_sub: Enter your new password. At least 8 characters.
account.reset_success: Password changed. Redirecting to sign in.
account.reset_error: The link is invalid or expired. Please request a new one.
account.reset_invalid: Password reset link is missing or invalid.
account.consents_help: You'll only receive messages about events you've marked as attending. You can change these preferences any time in your profile.
account.consent_organizer_messages: I want to receive information from event organizers about events I've marked as attending — by push notification or email.
account.consent_merchant_offers: I want to receive offers and special campaigns from merchants about events I've marked as attending — by push notification or email.
account.association_name_help: If you're a member of a society or association, add the name here — only visible to you.
account.country_help: We recommend setting this — we use it as a default search filter and in reminders.
account.docs_sub: SVTL Fighter Card and Equipment Passport (PDF). Only you and admins can open them.
account.fighter_card_help: Upload the PDF — you can re-open it later when you need it.
account.equipment_passport_help: Upload the equipment passport PDF — useful for gear checks at events.

attend.notify_help: You'll receive reminders before the event using the channels you choose. You can change these any time.

attending.title: Events you are attending
attending.help: Every event you marked as attending appears here.
attending.empty: You haven't marked attendance to any event yet.

saved_search.title: Default search filters
saved_search.help: Pre-fill the events list with these filters whenever you visit it.

stats.title: Attendees (anonymized)
stats.privacy_note: Only role and total counts are shown. Nicknames and emails are NEVER exposed for privacy reasons.

messaging.title: Send a message to attendees
messaging.blocked_title: This feature is not enabled for your account
messaging.blocked_help: Sending messages to event attendees is a paid feature. Contact support to activate it.
messaging.consent_help: The message is delivered only to users who 1) have marked attendance for the event you choose AND 2) have given consent to receive messages from your role (organizer or merchant). Their contact details are never shown to you.
messaging.subject: Subject
messaging.body_hint: Keep it concise — push notifications only show the first ~160 characters.
messaging.result_text: Push sent: {push}, emails sent: {email}, eligible recipients: {recipients}.
messaging.targets_help_all: Empty = message goes to all consenting attendees.
messaging.targets_help_some: Message is limited to attendees in the selected categories only.
messaging.no_push_tokens: Push recipients: 0. None of the matching attendees have enabled push notifications via the mobile app yet. Email still works if you used "Email" or "Push + Email" as the channel.

messages.title: Messages
messages.sent_empty: You haven't sent any messages yet.
messages.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this message?

courses.title: Courses & workshops
courses.sub: Crafts, swordsmanship, and other historical skill courses.
courses.p1: Beginner courses are organised across Finland in autumn and spring — join the hobby, learn the basics and rules of viking sword fighting, then continue training with other enthusiasts and participate safely in events and public demonstrations.
courses.p2: Besides beginner sword courses, the same associations usually organise other Iron Age and medieval crafts and skill workshops.
courses.list_body: If you'd like your association's course listed here, contact us via the form or email admin@viikinkitapahtumat.fi.

guilds.title: Guilds & associations
guilds.svtl_title: Finnish Association of Viking-Age Combat Sports (SVTL ry)
guilds.svtl_body: SVTL, founded in 2025, is the national federation for viking-age combat enthusiasts in Finland. Its members are communities practising viking-age, iron-age or comparable combat disciplines.
guilds.vanguard_body: The Coalition of Finnish Viking Fighters for Foreign Events!

shops.title: Shops & craftspeople
shops.no_upcoming: No upcoming events at the moment.

merchant_cta.title: Get a merchant card — reach the Nordic Viking community
merchant_cta.lead: A merchant card lifts your shop or smithy to the top of every Shops page and gives you your own profile page where people can learn more.
merchant_cta.benefit_visibility: Top placement in the "Featured merchants" strip on every page AND at the top of your category.
merchant_cta.benefit_profile: Your own profile page with photo, description, contact info and your upcoming events.
merchant_cta.benefit_favorites: Users can favourite you and receive notifications about your new events.
merchant_cta.benefit_duration: 12-month activation — one application, the whole year covered.
merchant_cta.fine_print: The feature is free of charge for now. A potential fee may be introduced in future releases and will be communicated separately before any change takes effect.
merchant_cta.dialog_lead: Fill in a few short details about your shop or smithy. We'll forward your request to the admins — you'll be notified once your card is activated.
merchant_cta.field_desc_ph: A few sentences about what you sell or do…
merchant_cta.submit_success: Request sent to admins — you'll be notified when activated.
merchant_cta.err_shop_required: Shop or smithy name is required.
merchant_cta.status_pending: Your previous request is awaiting review. You can update the details if needed.
merchant_cta.status_approved: Your request was approved and the merchant card is now active! Refresh the page to see the change.
merchant_cta.status_rejected: Your previous request was rejected. You can submit a new one if needed.

merchant_card.title: Merchant card
merchant_card.subtitle: Showcase your shop or smithy to the Viking community
merchant_card.not_enabled: Merchant card is not enabled on your account. Contact support to activate it.
merchant_card.expired: Your subscription has expired. Contact support to renew.
merchant_card.cta_inactive_body: The merchant card is a paid add-on that gives you a public profile page with image and contact info shown on the Shops page. Stripe checkout is coming soon — meanwhile support can activate it manually.
merchant_card.cta_disabled_body: Your merchant card is not active right now — either the subscription expired or support disabled it. Contact support to renew.
merchant_card.cta_active_body: Your merchant card is active. You can edit it below.

account_delete.title: Permanently delete account
account_delete.intro: This deletes your account, all your event RSVPs, email reminders, newsletter subscriptions and your merchant card (if any). Sent messages stay anonymised in the audit log. This action cannot be undone.
account_delete.confirm_label: Type your email address to confirm

sword.title: Viking sword fighting & reenactment
sword.lead: A rapidly growing hobby blending history, exercise and community.
sword.p1: Viking sword fighting reconstructs and brings to life the combat skills of the viking age authentically, while letting participants experience the spirit of the past.
sword.p2: It's not just physical activity — it's a deep study of viking warfare and culture. Practitioners dive into historical sources, archaeological finds and combat methods to understand and apply period-correct strategies.
sword.p3: Practical training focuses on basic sword technique, shield work, footwork and combat skills. Period weapons — viking swords and shields — create as authentic an experience as possible. Many groups follow strict safety rules.
sword.r1: Historical reenactment lets you experience and study past eras as living events. The viking era comes vividly and authentically to life.
sword.r2: Viking-era reenactors carefully study period clothing, weapons, food and lifestyle. They gather at events and festivals around the world to perform their roles.
sword.r3: This includes traditional cooking, crafts, period music and skill demonstrations — combat as well as crafts.
sword.r4: Reenactment connects people through shared passion and offers a vivid, interactive way to experience history while respecting cultural heritage.
sword.fact1: Communal — regular trainings and events around Finland.
sword.fact2: Safe — clear rules, training gear and experienced instructors.
sword.fact3: Historical — authentic techniques, weapons and equipment.

contact.title: Contact
contact.sub: Is your event missing from the listing, or do you want to update or correct information? Get in touch.
contact.form_sub: This form opens your email client with a pre-filled message. For full event submissions, use the "Submit event" page.
contact.tip: Tip: include a link and an image so your event looks great once approved.

newsletter.title: Get the viking calendar in your inbox
newsletter.body: Once a month we send a short summary of upcoming viking, iron-age and early-medieval events in Finland. No spam, unsubscribe any time.
newsletter.privacy: We only store your email address and language. We don't share emails with third parties.
newsletter.success_body: We've sent a confirmation to your email.
newsletter.unsub_body: You will no longer receive our newsletter. You can resubscribe any time from our site.
newsletter.unsub_invalid_body: This unsubscribe link has expired or is invalid.

remind.title: Remind me about this event
remind.subtitle: We'll send you an email reminder 7 days before the event.
remind.privacy: We only use your address to send this single reminder.
remind.success: Reminder set! Check your inbox for confirmation.
remind.already: You've already requested a reminder for this event.

favorites.title: My favorites
favorites.sub: Events you've starred are stored here in your browser.
favorites.empty: You haven't favorited any events yet.

subs.title: Newsletter subscribers
subs.sub: List of subscribers. Manually remove stale or invalid addresses.
subs.confirm_delete: Delete subscriber {email}? This cannot be undone.

password.too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
password.admin_reset_help_email: We'll email a reset link to the user's own address. They set a new password themselves — you never see it. The link is valid for 60 minutes.
password.admin_reset_destination_note: The link is sent only to this address — it cannot be redirected elsewhere.
password.admin_reset_sent_confirmation: ✓ Reset link sent. The user will receive the email within a few minutes.
